body: Yeah, this is fixed on current main in lossless-claw and will go out with the next release. Shouldn't be broken on released versions of openclaw.

Hitting this on OpenClaw 2026.4.12 as well.

Exact log excerpts from my host:

```text
Apr 13 23:36:23 srv1352768 node[1849045]: 2026-04-13T23:36:23.230+02:00 [diagnostic] lane task error: lane=main durationMs=200 error="Error: Context engine \"lossless-claw\" factory returned an invalid ContextEngine: info.id must match registered id \"lossless-claw\"."
Apr 13 23:36:23 srv1352768 node[1849045]: 2026-04-13T23:36:23.231+02:00 [diagnostic] lane task error: lane=session:agent:main:telegram:direct:866838380 durationMs=202 error="Error: Context engine \"lossless-claw\" factory returned an invalid ContextEngine: info.id must match registered id \"lossless-claw\"."
Apr 13 23:36:23 srv1352768 node[1849045]: 2026-04-13T23:36:23.232+02:00 Embedded agent failed before reply: Context engine "lossless-claw" factory returned an invalid ContextEngine: info.id must match registered id "lossless-claw".
Apr 13 23:55:55 srv1352768 node[1849709]: 2026-04-13T23:55:55.404+02:00 [diagnostic] lane task error: lane=main durationMs=1226 error="Error: Context engine \"lossless-claw\" factory returned an invalid ContextEngine: info.id must match registered id \"lossless-claw\"."
Apr 13 23:55:55 srv1352768 node[1849709]: 2026-04-13T23:55:55.415+02:00 [model-fallback/decision] model fallback decision: decision=candidate_failed requested=openai-codex/gpt-5.4 candidate=openai-codex/gpt-5.4 reason=unknown next=minimax-portal/MiniMax-M2.7 detail=Context engine "lossless-claw" factory returned an invalid ContextEngine: info.id must match registered id "lossless-claw".
Apr 14 00:43:01 srv1352768 node[1852280]: 2026-04-14T00:43:01.639+02:00 Embedded agent failed before reply: Context engine "lossless-claw" factory returned an invalid ContextEngine: info.id must match registered id "lossless-claw".
```

If helpful, I can verify the first tagged release that contains the fix once it is cut.
